channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: The Ramones to Honor 50th Anniversary of Debut Album With Year-Long Celebration Featuring Reissues, Museum Exhibit
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Hey there, music fans. Welcome to this week's episode of Trending on Billboard. Today, we're celebrating a major milestone in punk rock history. 50 years ago, on April 23rd, The Ramones released their self-titled debut album, an album that would change the music scene forever."
[Short music clip of "Blitzkrieg Bop" plays]
Host: "This album was a game-changer, with classics like 'Blitzkrieg Bop', 'Beat on the Brat', and 'Judy Is a Punk'. The Ramones' unique blend of bubblegum pop and high-speed punk rock wrote the template for the genre. And to mark this anniversary, the band and Rhino Records are launching a year-long celebration."
[Short music clip of "I Wanna Be Your Boyfriend" plays]
Host: "The celebration includes a world premiere exhibition at the Punk Rock Museum in Las Vegas on July 4th, featuring the band's music, memorabilia, and interactive experiences. And, a special 4th of July bash with Ramones tribute band Mama's Boy. Plus, fans can expect physical reissues, tribute performances, and remastered videos of classic tracks like 'I Wanna Be Sedated' and 'Rock N' Roll High School'."
[Short music clip of "Rock N' Roll High School" plays]
Host: "To check out the remastered videos, head over to The Ramones' YouTube page. That's all for today's episode. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the flip side."
[Outro music plays]
